_meta.author: OpenAI ChatGPT for Peter Higgins
_meta.purpose: Document the methodological lineage, precedent, naming architecture, concept solidification chain, and current method-status table for the EITT/CoDa/HIVP programme.

recommended_naming_architecture.guiding_rule: Do not discard existing names that already carry validated meaning. Add one umbrella name for the full methodology while preserving the established sub-names.

science.name: Entropy-Invariant Time Transformer
science.role: Primary scientific claim and main observable.

decomposition_engine.name: The Higgins Decomposition
decomposition_engine.role: Operational state-machine / process-line implementation of CoDa + EITT.

development_chain.name: Higgins Iterative Validation Protocol
development_chain.role: Regression-chain rule for advancing the method without breaking prior DUTs.

recommended_umbrella_methodology.name: Higgins Iterative Validation and Integrity Protocol
recommended_umbrella_methodology.role: Recommended umbrella name for the full methodology: theory + instrument development + contamination control + regression discipline.

keep: Keep Higgins Decomposition for the stepwise engine.
Keep HIVP for the historical regression-chain name.
add: Use HIVIP as the broader umbrella only when referring to the full research methodology, including contamination control and integrity doctrine.
avoid: Do not rename everything under one term and lose the role distinction.
Do not use HUF-GOV as the core scientific name.

recommended_naming_architecture.one_line_summary: EITT is the science. The Higgins Decomposition is the engine. HIVP is the chain. HIVIP is the full methodology.

precedent_and_lineage_chain.name: Compositional Data Analysis lineage
precedent_and_lineage_chain.what_is_inherited: The structural mathematics of constrained data living on the simplex.
precedent_and_lineage_chain.what_the_project_adds: A temporal-invariance reading layered on top of the CoDa structure.

precedent_and_lineage_chain.name: Information / entropy lineage
precedent_and_lineage_chain.what_is_inherited: Entropy as a measure of compositional balance and information content.
precedent_and_lineage_chain.what_the_project_adds: The empirical claim that legitimate compositional time series preserve entropy under geometric-mean block decimation.

precedent_and_lineage_chain.name: Metrology lineage
precedent_and_lineage_chain.what_is_inherited: An instrument must report what it knows, how well it knows it, and where it should not be trusted.
precedent_and_lineage_chain.what_the_project_adds: RMS error, SNR, ETF, stagewise RMSE, and explicit envelope reporting for compositional temporal diagnostics.

precedent_and_lineage_chain.name: Systems engineering and V&V lineage
precedent_and_lineage_chain.what_is_inherited: A complex system must expose its process line, not just its final verdict.
precedent_and_lineage_chain.what_the_project_adds: The 10-step / 12-state decomposition chain with gauges and local fault modes at each station.

precedent_and_lineage_chain.name: Scientific regression-testing lineage
precedent_and_lineage_chain.what_is_inherited: A new modification is not accepted unless prior successes still hold.
precedent_and_lineage_chain.what_the_project_adds: HIVP: every new DUT may extend the theory only if the entire prior chain still passes.

precedent_and_lineage_chain.name: Data-integrity / GLP lineage
precedent_and_lineage_chain.what_is_inherited: Good results require clean records, clean handling, and transparent transformations.
precedent_and_lineage_chain.what_the_project_adds: Explicit recognition that data, theory, and method can contaminate one another.

precedent_and_lineage_chain.name: Adversarial robustness lineage
precedent_and_lineage_chain.what_is_inherited: A trustworthy instrument must survive deliberate attempts to fool it.
precedent_and_lineage_chain.what_the_project_adds: Stored-energy attacks, entropy stuffing, contamination grafts, and Pass 2 integrity alarms.

precedent_and_lineage_chain.name: Exploratory science lineage
precedent_and_lineage_chain.what_is_inherited: Exploratory work is legitimate when clearly distinguished from settled claims.
precedent_and_lineage_chain.what_the_project_adds: Resolution classes and progressive promotion from exploratory overlay to candidate method to canonical tool.

solidification_of_concepts.statement: A concept becomes solid not when it is attractive, but when it survives refinement without corrupting the DUT chain.

promotion_ladder.name: exploratory_pattern
promotion_ladder.definition: Interesting visual, analogy, or domain-specific signal. May inspire work, but does not yet influence core claims.

promotion_ladder.name: candidate_overlay
promotion_ladder.definition: Testable add-on readout that may rank or explain cases, but does not alter the science signal.

promotion_ladder.name: process_control_candidate
promotion_ladder.definition: Methodological addition that can improve integrity, detection, or transparency, but must survive HIVP.

promotion_ladder.name: validated_companion
promotion_ladder.definition: A robust secondary instrument that adds information while remaining separate from the core observable.

promotion_ladder.name: canonical_method_component
promotion_ladder.definition: A promoted method element that has survived cross-domain validation and regression through prior DUTs.

promotion_ladder.name: core_science
promotion_ladder.definition: The non-negotiable primary claim of the programme.

solidification_of_concepts.anti_corruption_rule: No concept is allowed to climb the ladder by improving one domain at the cost of contaminating earlier DUTs or the core signal.

contamination_doctrine.core_statement: The project arc depends on keeping theory, data, and method from contaminating one another.

examples: sparse boundary data mistaken for a universal law
shuffled or injected data mistaken for legitimate structure
overclaiming precision beyond the instrument's resolution class

contamination_doctrine.integrity_rule: Prefer a weaker but cleaner claim over a stronger contaminated one.

current_methods_table.role: Map raw observables to the compositional manifold
good_points: Foundational CoDa operation
Required for valid entropy and log-ratio work
Clear and reproducible
untested_or_open_points: Domain-specific mapping choices may still need comparison in some new datasets

good_points: Strong mathematical precedent
Supports sigma-squared-A, variation matrix, distance, PCA, depth
untested_or_open_points: Choice of balance basis in higher-D operational dashboards still needs standardization

good_points: Cross-domain evidence strongly favors it over arithmetic decimation
Preserves structure where arithmetic introduces persistent bias
untested_or_open_points: Formal proof remains incomplete in the general case
Higher-D and near-boundary tightening still needs hardening

current_methods_table.method: Shannon entropy invariance under geometric decimation
good_points: Validated across commodities, energy, nuclear, acoustics, geochemistry, and blind tests
Separates legitimate temporal structure from many fabricated cases
untested_or_open_points: General theorem still incomplete
Exact higher-order terms and broadest applicability boundary remain open

good_points: Simple and interpretable
Strong separation in blind tests
untested_or_open_points: Threshold tuning across small-N and high-D edge cases still needs care

good_points: One of the strongest discoveries of EXP-04
Gives richer interpretation than pass/fail alone
Cross-domain overlays are promising
untested_or_open_points: Need canonical smoothing, derivative, and reporting conventions
Need more formal theory linking slope to specific physical mechanisms

good_points: Useful cross-domain summary
Bridges structural and temporal views
untested_or_open_points: Need strict separation of M_last_pass, M_break, and max tested M
Predictive equation is still qualitative / loose

good_points: Catches some cases the primary metric can miss
Does not need to rewrite the core signal
Fits naturally in Pass 2
untested_or_open_points: Thresholds still need wider cross-domain calibration
Should remain separate from the primary science claim until more hardening is complete

current_methods_table.role: Pass 1 classification plus Pass 2 integrity resolution
good_points: Improves blind-test performance from 17/20 to 18/20
Respects ambiguity by reporting resolution boundaries
untested_or_open_points: Needs standard operating rules frozen before broad deployment
Needs more independent domain retesting

good_points: Makes risk, detectability, low-power zones, and vertex proximity explicit
Prevents overclaiming
untested_or_open_points: Need wider calibration of soft and hard thresholds in high-D settings

good_points: Very strong fit with the decomposition-engine concept
Aligns with metrology and systems-engineering precedent
untested_or_open_points: Needs repeated use on more real datasets to determine which gauges are truly essential

good_points: Improves trust by showing where cosmetic improvement equals contamination
Strongly supports the integrity role of F17
untested_or_open_points: Needs formal library of standard attacks and severity classes

good_points: Organizes slope, lock, and contamination intuitively
Helpful for cross-domain reasoning
untested_or_open_points: Analogy is ahead of proof
Should not be treated as a finished theorem

current_methods_table.method: SEMF compositional basin in nuclear analysis
current_methods_table.role: Primary physical basis for nuclear prediction work
good_points: Physically grounded
Works naturally with EITT/CoDa thermodynamic language
Supports corridor-level reasoning
untested_or_open_points: Exact shell closures still need external physics overlay and deeper internal testing

good_points: Interesting structured visual pattern
May encode shell/packing irregularity indirectly
untested_or_open_points: No validated statistical superiority over null models yet
Must not drive primary claims until it beats shell-only and random baselines

best_next_step_logic.rule: Advance the programme by strengthening what is already clean before promoting what is only suggestive.
priority_order: Standardize the two-pass instrument and stagewise RMSE panels
Calibrate F17 and envelope thresholds on more real domains
Harden nuclear corridor prediction using SEMF plus shell support
Only then test exploratory overlays like the prime staircase against null models

claude_instruction.exact_text: Present the programme as a lineage-aware instrument methodology. Keep EITT as the science, the Higgins Decomposition as the engine, HIVP as the regression chain, and HIVIP as the recommended umbrella for the full integrity-aware methodology. Treat concept solidification as a promotion ladder whose purpose is to reduce contamination of the DUT chain over time.
